description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a striking red exterior. The body features sculpted curves and aggressive lines, with a sharply pointed front end and prominent air intakes. The roof and window area are finished in black, contrasting with the vibrant red bodywork. The car sits on large, black five-spoke alloy wheels, and the rear is equipped with dual exhausts and a subtle integrated spoiler. The headlights are narrow and angular, while the taillights are round and set wide apart. The overall design emphasizes speed, luxury, and advanced engineering, typical of modern supercars.
description: A red, low-profile sports car with sculpted curves, black roof, and large five-spoke alloy wheels. Features aggressive styling, narrow headlights, and dual rear exhausts.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the car's aerodynamic curves, black roof, and large five-spoke wheels.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view showing the dual exhausts, round taillights, and integrated rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the sleek body lines, black roof, and wheel design.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view displaying the pointed nose, narrow headlights, and sculpted hood.
